learn.label: Learn
learn.headline: From discovery to recommendation
learn.summary: Present solutions that fit the client’s goals — as a financial entrepreneur, not a product pusher.
bullets: Handle questions with confidence and honesty
Connect solutions back to the client’s life goals
learn.callout: Week 8 is Advisor Revalida — practice like it counts.

workshop.label: Workshop
workshop.headline: Solution presentation lab
bullets: Present a solution based on a discovery scenario
Refine your closing and next-step ask

assignment.label: Assignment
assignment.headline: Stage Gate 2 prep
assignment.summary: Begin preparing for Advisor Revalida (Stage Gate 2).
bullets: Review your FEC and pitch from Week 4

reflection.label: Reflection
reflection.headline: Are you ready to advise?
prompts: Where do you feel most confident?
How has your entrepreneur mindset grown since Week 1?
